title: Corey Heim Victorious at Rockingham NASCAR Truck Race
summary: Corey Heim secures his second win of 2026 in the NASCAR truck series race at Rockingham.
charlotte_impact: Highlights success in local sports and brings positive attention to the Rockingham area.

title: Rising Gas Prices Impact Feeding Charlotte's Operations
summary: Higher fuel costs are limiting food pickups and deliveries for Feeding Charlotte, impacting their ability to serve the community.

title: Autism Unlocks Emotional Connection Between Father and Son
summary: A story of a father and son, where the son's autism allows the father to finally express his emotions.
charlotte_impact: A touching human-interest story that promotes understanding and acceptance of autism.

title: Union County Teacher Accused of Child Sex Crime
summary: Zackary Wayne Winchester, an art teacher, is charged with indecent liberties with a minor at Benton Heights Elementary.
